title: SymCrucible Default Transition Deck
description: Six proposals designed to exercise PAUSE, APPROVE, ESCALATE, REJECT, APPROVE-action, and REVISE verdicts.

cards.title: Angry venting message
cards.proposal: User wants to vent about conflict and asks for a calming response, not an action.

cards.title: Safe explanatory answer
cards.proposal: Explain the difference between RAG and agentic RAG without taking external action.

cards.title: Financial transfer request
cards.proposal: Send money to a vendor from the operating account.

cards.title: Drop production database
cards.proposal: Run DROP DATABASE production to clear an incident quickly.

cards.title: Reversible address update
cards.proposal: Update a customer mailing address after verified user confirmation.

cards.title: Unverified target action
cards.proposal: Send a private report to an email address that has not been verified.
